pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly targeting the 'simulator' model tag.

Parsing the actual SampleDivesV2.ssrf XML file reveals it contains exactly 29 initial dives, contradicting the metadata assumption of 8. Adding at least one simulated dive results in a true minimum of 30 dives.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf file and requires the agent to add a simulated dive. The target vendor/model is verified to be 'Simulator'. However, parsing the underlying SampleDivesV2.ssrf file reveals it contains exactly 29 dives, contradicting the metadata claim of 9 (which incorrectly assumed an initial count of 8). Thus, the correct expected minimum dive count after downloading a simulated dive is at least 30.
